Teams that work together, win together
Multiple teams come together with sales to close deals. With Zoho CRM for Everyone, you can build unique, collaborative spaces for each team â all with some AI assistance, of course. Start winning more, together.

New to CRM? No problem. Teams can create their own modules through simple prompts.
Create detailed list views based on images. Upload a layout you like and generate a custom Canvas layout instantly.
Staying relevant and driving innovation, 
since 2005

Take us for a spin!
Quick Tour
Watch Overview
Frequently Asked Questions
Can I integrate my favorite apps with 
Zoho CRM?
Zoho CRM seamlessly integrates with over 1,000+ applications, and it takes no time to set up and get started. Check out Zoho Marketplace to find out which of your daily-drivers are ready to pair.
How do I know what's the right edition for me?
Try our 
Edition Selector
 and answer a few questions about your requirements for a CRM. Based on your choices, we'll recommend the edition that aligns best with your business goals.
How flexible are the contracts?
You are not bound by any contracts or commitments. 
Zoho CRM
 is a pay-as-you-go service (monthly or yearly), so you can make changes to your plan whenever you need to, and upgrade or downgrade at will.
 How do I migrate to 
Zoho CRM?
You can comfortably switch to Zoho from any popular CRM serviceâeven spreadsheets. You can also avail our Jumpstart service that includes everything from requirement gathering to setup and onboarding. Alongside, we have a dedicated program Enterprises looking to move, and we'll help you get started in no time.
Explore Zwitch (Migration)
Explore Jumpstart (Service)
Contact EBS (Enterprise)
Is Zoho CRM available for my industry?
Zoho CRM is built to serve business of all kinds, and we cater to all industries and verticals. Explore our 
industry-specific solutions
 to learn more, and book a personalized demo to understand how 
Zoho CRM
 can be customized to meet your business needs.
Does Zoho CRM have a free plan?
Zoho CRM's freemium edition supports up to 3 users and comes with the essentials like leads, documents, and mobile apps, itâs a perfect fit for your home business. Alternatively, check out 
Bigin by Zoho CRM,
 built specifically for small businesses, freelancers, and entrepreneurs.
Can I get a demo of 
Zoho CRM?
Yes, we would be happy to demonstrate 
Zoho CRM
 through a web-conference at your convenience. The demo is a one hour session. To schedule your personal session, please contact 
sales@zohocorp.com.

composio_raw.name: Zoho
composio_raw.description: Zoho is a suite of cloud applications including CRM, email marketing, and collaboration tools, enabling businesses to automate and scale operations

llm_raw.description: A comprehensive customer relationship management platform designed to help businesses manage sales, marketing, and customer support processes.
llm_raw.notes: Zoho CRM is highly buildable and already has extensive integrations (including 57 tools on Composio) utilizing its comprehensive REST API with OAuth2.
